'''kowaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lymphangiogenic|lymphangiogenic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lymphangiogenic|lymphangiogenic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kowaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowarithi|kowarithi]] || [[word:kowariji|kowariji]] || [[word:kowarishi|kowarishi]] || [[word:kowariki|kowariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowaruthuthu|kowaruthuthu]] || [[word:kowarujuju|kowarujuju]] || [[word:kowarushushu|kowarushushu]] || [[word:kowarukuku|kowarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowaruthu|kowaruthu]] || [[word:kowaruju|kowaruju]] || [[word:kowarushu|kowarushu]] || [[word:kowaruku|kowaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowarufthuf|kowarufthuf]] || [[word:kowarufjuf|kowarufjuf]] || [[word:kowarufshuf|kowarufshuf]] || [[word:kowarufkuf|kowarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowarethe|kowarethe]] || [[word:kowareje|kowareje]] || [[word:kowareshe|kowareshe]] || [[word:kowareke|kowareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowarothotho|kowarothotho]] || [[word:kowarojojo|kowarojojo]] || [[word:kowaroshosho|kowaroshosho]] || [[word:kowarokoko|kowarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowarotho|kowarotho]] || [[word:kowarojo|kowarojo]] || [[word:kowarosho|kowarosho]] || [[word:kowaroko|kowaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowarofthof|kowarofthof]] || [[word:kowarofjof|kowarofjof]] || [[word:kowarofshof|kowarofshof]] || [[word:kowarofkof|kowarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfthÃŸf|kowarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfjÃŸf|kowarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfshÃŸf|kowarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfkÃŸf|kowarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kowarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kowarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kowarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kowarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfthÃŸf|kowarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfjÃŸf|kowarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfshÃŸf|kowarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfkÃŸf|kowarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfthÃŸf|kowarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfjÃŸf|kowarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfshÃŸf|kowarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowarÃŸfkÃŸf|kowarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowarÃḊthÃḊ|kowarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kowarÃḊjÃḊ|kowarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kowarÃḊshÃḊ|kowarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kowarÃḊkÃḊ|kowarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowarathatha|kowarathatha]] || [[word:kowarajaja|kowarajaja]] || [[word:kowarashasha|kowarashasha]] || [[word:kowarakaka|kowarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowaratha|kowaratha]] || [[word:kowaraja|kowaraja]] || [[word:kowarasha|kowarasha]] || [[word:kowaraka|kowaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowarafthaf|kowarafthaf]] || [[word:kowarafjaf|kowarafjaf]] || [[word:kowarafshaf|kowarafshaf]] || [[word:kowarafkaf|kowarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kowarasha|kowarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowarshÃḋasha|kowarshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowarroasha|kowarroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowarmuasha|kowarmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowaryaasha|kowaryaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowarnkshÃḋasha|gokowarnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowarnkroasha|gokowarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowarnkmuasha|gokowarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowarnkyaasha|gokowarnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kowawarasha|kowawarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowawarshÃḋasha|kowawarshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowawarroasha|kowawarroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowawarmuasha|kowawarmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowawaryaasha|kowawaryaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowawarnkshÃḋasha|gokowawarnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowawarnkroasha|gokowawarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowawarnkmuasha|gokowawarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowawarnkyaasha|gokowawarnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kewÃḊrasha|kewÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kewÃḊrshÃḋasha|kewÃḊrshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kewÃḊrroasha|kewÃḊrroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kewÃḊrmuasha|kewÃḊrmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kewÃḊryaasha|kewÃḊryaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokewÃḊrnkshÃḋasha|gokewÃḊrnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokewÃḊrnkroasha|gokewÃḊrnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokewÃḊrnkmuasha|gokewÃḊrnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokewÃḊrnkyaasha|gokewÃḊrnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kowfarasha|kowfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowfarshÃḋasha|kowfarshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowfarroasha|kowfarroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowfarmuasha|kowfarmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowfaryaasha|kowfaryaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowfarnkshÃḋasha|gokowfarnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowfarnkroasha|gokowfarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowfarnkmuasha|gokowfarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowfarnkyaasha|gokowfarnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
